modification.old: - Evidence-First: 每次校验生成 EvidenceRef
modification.new: - Evidence-Mandatory: 每次校验生成 EvidenceRef

EVID-T2-F3-R5-001.rationale: Evidence-Mandatory accurately reflects the requirement without temporal ordering bias

modification.old: - Evidence-First: 每次签发尝试都生成 EvidenceRef
modification.new: - Evidence-Mandatory: 每次签发尝试都生成 EvidenceRef

EVID-T2-F3-R5-002.rationale: Evidence-Mandatory accurately reflects the requirement for issuance attempts

EVID-T2-F3-R5-003.rationale: evidence-mandatory captures the requirement without suggesting evidence precedes decision

EVID-T2-F3-R5-004.rationale: evidence_traceability accurately describes audit trail requirement

EVID-T2-F3-R5-005.rationale: evidence_traceability accurately describes audit trail requirement
